overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a first-person motorcycle ride along a deserted coastal urban waterfront during golden hour sunset. The player drives a red Arch Nazaré motorcycle from under concrete overpasses onto a sandy beach and into shallow ocean water, passing neon-lit skyscrapers and approaching a massive roller coaster structure silhouetted against the setting sun.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass, driving on a dirt trail through partially covered space. The motorcycle weaves between support pillars as dry grass and palm trees line the path. Around 8.5 seconds, the scene opens up to reveal the coastal beach and sunset horizon ahead.

small wooden structure on the beach

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges from under the overpass onto a wide sandy beach bathed in golden hour light. The camera approaches the shoreline where a wooden pier and distant roller coaster are visible against the sunset. At 15.5 seconds, the bike enters the shallow water, creating splashes as it transitions from sand to sea.

segments.scene_description: Driving through shallow water along the coastline, the camera pans to reveal a stunning cyberpunk cityscape with neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards reflecting off the water. The sun sets brilliantly on the horizon. Around 35 seconds, the motorcycle turns back toward the massive roller coaster structure looming ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waters approaching abandoned amusement park structure

events.description: passing through area with increased floating debris and ruined structures
entering the shadow cast by the massive roller coaster structure

agents.ego_description: speeding through shallow water directly toward the roller coaster with the sun setting behind it

scattered trash and wooden planks in the water

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle speeds through the shallow coastal water toward the massive roller coaster structure, now dominating the left side of the frame. The camera passes floating debris and ruined buildings along the shore. At 55 seconds, the scene darkens as the vehicle enters the shadow cast by the roller coaster's framework.

scene_state.functional_zone: underneath roller coaster pier in shallow ocean water

events.description: passing directly underneath the roller coaster tracks and support pillars

agents.ego_description: riding underneath the massive roller coaster structure with water splashing around the motorcycle

entered.detail: thick concrete and steel support columns for the roller coaster
intricate steel lattice of roller coaster tracks overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place underneath the massive roller coaster structure, with the camera driving between thick concrete pillars and steel support beams. The sky is partially occluded by the metal framework overhead, creating a dramatic contrast between the shadowed interior and the golden sunset visible through the gaps. The motorcycle continues through the shallow water, passing directly under the roller coaster tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ride that transitions from the shadowed depths of an urban overpass into a brilliant, sun-drenched coastal expanse. It begins by weaving through concrete support pillars and dry grass under a massive highway structure before the path opens up to reveal a wide sandy beach and a glowing sunset horizon. As the motorcycle emerges into the golden hour light, the camera glides across the sand toward a distant wooden pier and a silhouetted roller coaster, eventually splashing into the shallow ocean water. The scene then expands to reveal a cyberpunk cityscape of neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards reflecting off the sea, before finally turning back toward the looming structure of the roller coaster against the setting sun.

The shot follows a continuous ride through shallow coastal waters that transitions from an open shoreline into the oppressive shadow of a massive industrial structure. It begins with the motorcycle speeding across the water toward a towering roller coaster that dominates the left side of the frame, passing floating debris and ruined buildings along the coast. As the vehicle advances, the bright golden light fades and the scene darkens as the camera enters the deep shadow cast by the roller coaster's framework. The environment then shifts into a claustrophobic corridor of thick concrete pillars and steel support beams, where the sky is partially occluded by the metal overhead. Finally, the camera continues through the shallow water, driving directly under the intricate network of tracks with the sunset visible only through the gaps in the steel.
